name: Unsafe Deserialization via pickle or yaml.load
description: Untrusted data flows into pickle.loads(), pickle.load(), or yaml.load() without a safe Loader. Both pickle and default YAML loading can execute arbitrary code during deserialization.
remediation: Never use pickle to deserialize untrusted data. Use JSON or another safe serialization format. For YAML, always use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load(). If pickle is required for trusted internal data, ensure the input source is cryptographically authenticated.
